summary: Szarfman shares an EB data mining analysis; Niu confirms to Menschik she is not collaborating.
body:
- Szarfman shares with Niu and other FDA officials an analysis of EB data mining issues unrelated to DuMouchel's new data mining method.[^fn-151] Niu forwards Szarfman's analysis to Zinderman, Baer, and Menschik.[^fn-152] In response, Menschik asks, "[d]id you request this or anything else (COVID vaccine data mining related) from Ana and/or are you working with Ana on any data mining projects? (if so, please specify)[.]"[^fn-153]
- Niu responds to Menschik in two separate emails, writing first, "[n]o, I haven't requested anything from Ana. I am only passively passing on her data mining runs when she sends them to me."[^fn-154] She quickly sends a second email stating that she is "not working on anything with [Szarfman]."[^fn-155]
- The same day, Niu also sends Menschik her previous conversation with Szarfman, in which Niu told Szarfman that she cannot collaborate with her.[^fn-156]
